economic_notes: Pigeon River Contractors Ltd. fully consolidated in 2020 (previously equity method). Berens River holds two quarry leases. Operations include fuel, gravel, barge services, gaming, log inn, and marine services.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to weaknesses in internal controls over cash-based revenue and expenditures in Berens River Gaming Commission and Berens River Community Bingo — revenues and expenses of these entities could not be verified. Pigeon River Contractors Ltd. was previously accounted for under modified equity method and was fully consolidated in FY2020, significantly impacting comparability. Six fully consolidated subsidiaries: Mee-Mee-Wee-Seepi Development Corporation, Nipi Marine Service Ltd., Berens River Housing Authority Inc., Berens River Log Inn Inc., 7269251 Manitoba Ltd., and Pigeon River Contractors Ltd. Segmented information shows Public Works segment includes Mee-Mee-Wee-Seepi expenses of $7,386,175. Large increase in long-term debt from $7,858,565 to $12,072,052. Prior year total expenses in segmented disclosure ($25,872,130) differs slightly from statement of operations ($25,790,533) due to reclassifications.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
